# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch Snapshot Configuration
elasticsearch:
  snapshots:
    repositories:
      # AWS S3 Repository configuration
      - id: s3_repository
        type: s3
        settings:
          bucket: my-bucket
          region: us-west-1
          access_key: AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
          secret_key: wJalrXUtnWXYZ1234567890123456789
        snapshot_retention_policy: 30
      # File share repository configuration
      - id: fileshare_repository
        type: filesystem
        settings:
          location: /backups/elasticsearch
    schedule:
      # Daily snapshots every day at 1am.
      - cron: "0 1 * * *"
        name: daily_snapshot
        repository: s3_repository
        config:
          include_global_state: true
